source: Charon-as-Learner-Tester 6-fire arc (fires 001-006), 33 probes across 11 of 12 lanes, 2026-05-06 to 2026-05-07
calibrated_caveat: On out-of-distribution math probes the LoRA adapter has near-zero observable effect (lora_post_train ≡ base_zero_shot on Variant A, confirmed by both producer and tester). Findings are predominantly base-Qwen-on-math-natural-language behavior. This corpus is therefore a base-model-failure corpus that the v1.0 Learner training corpus must train AGAINST as hard negatives.
doctrine_alignment: HARD-4 calibration anchors are load-bearing infrastructure; HARD-5 trivial-vs-open distinction is architecturally important

failure_mode_taxonomy.name: question-spec-hallucination
failure_mode_taxonomy.description: Hallucinates extra question parts not asked

failure_mode_taxonomy.name: confused-identity
failure_mode_taxonomy.description: Object-level identity error (e.g., second zero given for first)

failure_mode_taxonomy.name: surface-correct-substantively-wrong
failure_mode_taxonomy.description: Correct keywords; places open question at trivially-proven case OR makes false ancillary claims. ARCHITECTURALLY MOST INSIDIOUS

failure_mode_taxonomy.name: internal-arithmetic-inconsistency
failure_mode_taxonomy.description: Derived value differs from boxed value, math impossible

failure_mode_taxonomy.name: token-loop-degeneration
failure_mode_taxonomy.description: Repeated phrase loop at end of response

fabrications.probe: smallest unconditional prime gap that occurs ∞ often

fabrications.correct: Codim 2 is the open case; codim 1 is Lefschetz (1924)

fabrications.fabrication: gap of 2 is currently the best known result

fabrications.correct: α_GW ≈ 0.8786 via transcendental (min over θ of 2θ/(π(1-cos θ)))
Reyssat 1987 record q ≈ 1.6299; (2,3,5) is not on the record list

fabrications.fabrication: by J. R. J. M. R. F. C. R. J. M. R. F. C... (looped initials)

fabrications.probe: first non-trivial Riemann zeta zero imaginary part
fabrications.correct: 14.1347 IS the first non-trivial zero (im part); attribution to second is wrong
internally inconsistent — derivation and answer cannot both be right

fabrications.fabrication: the Bochart of R^n, the Bochart of R^n... (50+ repetitions)

trivial_vs_open_pairs.doctrine_relevance: FM-08 architectural pattern; substrate must distinguish trivially-proven from open

trivial_case.description: Ternary Goldbach (every odd integer ≥ 7 is sum of three primes)

open_case.description: Binary Goldbach (every even integer ≥ 4 is sum of two primes)

trivial_vs_open_pairs.doctrine_relevance: FM-08 — trivial vs open within same conjecture family

trivial_case.result_type: fully proven for full conjectured range

trivial_case.description: Catalan's conjecture (only 8,9 are consecutive perfect powers)

open_case.description: Pillai's conjecture (gap_k-th-powers grows); FLT exact-equation for n>2 (Wiles 1995, proven)

trivial_case.description: First N zeros lie on critical line

open_case.description: All non-trivial zeros lie on critical line

correct_attributions_canonical.theorem: FLT (no nontrivial integer solutions x^n+y^n=z^n for n≥3)

correct_attributions_canonical.venue: L'analysis situs et la géométrie algébrique

uncertainty_calibration_examples.model_behavior: correctly handled — refused to claim widespread acceptance, named the Mochizuki/Scholze-Stix dispute
uncertainty_calibration_examples.doctrine_relevance: Demonstrates the model CAN refuse-with-nuance when the topic is famously contested. Failure on attribution probes is therefore not a capability gap — it is a mode-engagement gap. v1.0 corpus should include attribution-uncertainty triggers training the model to engage refuse-with-reason on attribution boundaries.
Same — refusal mode is intact for this archetype.

uncertainty_calibration_examples.model_behavior: correctly handled — no known counterexample claimed
uncertainty_calibration_examples.doctrine_relevance: Same — base model has refusal mode for famous-open-conjecture probes.

v1_0_training_implications.primary: The 19 fabrications above + 5 trivial-vs-open pairs + 13 canonical attributions form a hard-negative + positive-pair training set. Each fabrication paired with its correction is one training example. Each trivial-vs-open pair paired together teaches the boundary distinction.
v1_0_training_implications.secondary: Multi-part question degeneration is a PROMPT-PROTOCOL issue (not training); see Ergon ticket for single-fact-decomposition prompt change.
v1_0_training_implications.tertiary: Verbose-textbook-mode is structural — no hyperparameter (max_new_tokens 96/192/256/384) shifted it. Concise-output-instruction-tuning corpus needed in v1.0; experimental concise-prefix prompt prefix worth testing first per Ergon's pre-registered hypothesis 2.1.
v1_0_training_implications.explicitly_NOT_targeted: Topic disengagement (FM not in the 10 above; see Ergon Pattern 3) is base-Qwen-knowledge-gap, not fabrication. Different intervention class — would require knowledge-augmentation training, not anti-fabrication training. Keep separable.

anchor_count_contribution.doctrine_alignment: HARD-4 anchor density grows in attribution-boundary territory which was previously unmeasured
